response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack engineering experience and contributions to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit evidence of executive-level leadership in agentic AI or fintech domains. His background in distributed systems and event-driven architectures is relevant, though the role requires deeper fintech-specific expertise and proven scaling of engineering teams in regulated environments.
strengths: Strong technical depth in distributed systems and event-driven architectures, relevant to agentic AI frameworks.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent tooling (e.g., MCP code generators) and open-source contributions.
Diverse engineering background spanning fintech-adjacent domains (e.g., real-time data, microservices).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., CTO, VP Engineering) or track record scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Limited evidence of fintech-specific expertise (e.g., credit systems, compliance, or regulatory integration).
Agentic AI experience appears peripheral (e.g., tooling) rather than core architecture of production multi-agent systems.
